violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No employee certified in food safety management available at the time of inspection. Establishment does have an active FMC. Establishment must have employee(s) register in, and successfully complete, an approved course in food safety management. Resource provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

Thermometer is lacking in the dessert display case. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, brown/black residue, and other debris. Ice machine is to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026
